publishedAbstract: Ceph goes into `HEALTH_WARN` while OSD Daemon crashes appear in the `$ ceph-s` output. In ODF Environments, this will result in pod restarts as well. The OSDs are failing rocksdb compaction due to a known bug that is fixed in Red Hat Ceph Storage 7.1z4- 7.1.4 (18.2.1-329.el9cp) or higher for RHCS 7. Alternatively, a fix is implemented in Red Hat Ceph Storage 8.1z1- 8.1.1 (19.2.1-222.el9cp) or higher for RHCS 8 as well. **This issue can only be permanently fixed by upgrading to the specified Red Hat Ceph Storage 7.1z4- 7.1.4 (18.2.1-329.el9cp)+ / 8.1z1- 8.1.1 (19.2.1-222.el9cp)+, and in some cases has resulted in data loss if enough OSDs progress to a permanent "down" state**. This solution will serve as a temporary workaround if an upgrade cannot be performed immediately. Please note that if performing the workaround, it will only delay the issue and must be closely monitored. It is strongly recommended to upgrade As Soon As Possible **(ASAP)**. ~~~ rook-ceph-osd-0-88755d777-gchs9 2/2 Running 3 (9h ago) 45h rook-ceph-osd-1-758cc4b459-6hcfn 2/2 Running 1 (31h ago) 44h rook-ceph-osd-3-766f4467b8-7r9mh 2/2 Running 1 (96m ago) 44h rook-ceph-osd-4-c59497c98-86nxq 2/2 Running 2 (30h ago) 44h sh-5.1$ ceph-s health: HEALTH_WARN 7 daemons have recently crashed services: mon: 3 daemons, quorum b,c,d (age 45h) mgr: a(active, since 45h), standbys: b mds: 1/1 daemons up, 1 hot standby osd: 6 osds: 6 up (since 104m), 6 in (since 3y) rgw: 1 daemon active (1 hosts, 1 zones) data: volumes: 1/1 healthy pools: 12 pools, 217 pgs objects: 502.66k objects, 1.2 TiB usage: 3.7 TiB used, 20 TiB / 24 TiB avail pgs: 217 active+clean sh-5.1$ ceph health detail HEALTH_WARN 2 daemons have recently crashed [WRN] RECENT_CRASH: 7 daemons have recently crashed osd.0 crashed on host rook-ceph-osd-0- osd.0 crashed on host rook-ceph-osd-0- osd.0 crashed on host rook-ceph-osd-0- osd.3 crashed on host rook-ceph-osd-3- osd.4 crashed on host rook-ceph-osd-4- osd.4 crashed on host rook-ceph-osd-4- osd.1 crashed on host rook-ceph-osd-1- ~~~
publishedTitle: Ceph OSDs/rook-ceph-osd pods Crashing - ["assert_line:" 507 abort offset_type range_end() const] - Message: "assert_thread_name": "rocksdb:low", "BlueFS::truncate", "rocksdb::DBImpl::BGWorkCompaction(void*)"
